sentences.arabic: تَعَلُّمُ الْبَرْمَجَةِ يَفْتَحُ أَبْوَابًا كَثِيرَةً لِلشَّبَابِ فِي سُوقِ الْعَمَلِ.
sentences.translation: Učenje programiranja otvara mnoga vrata mladima na tržištu rada.
sentences.translationEn: Learning programming opens many doors for young people in the job market.

sentences.arabic: كَتَبَ خَالِدٌ أَوَّلَ بَرْنَامَجٍ لَهُ بِاسْتِخْدَامِ لُغَةِ "بَايْثُون".
sentences.translation: Khalid je napisao svoj prvi program koristeći jezik 'Python'.
sentences.translationEn: Khalid wrote his first program using the 'Python' language.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الْأَمْرُ صَعْبًا فِي الْبِدَايَةِ لَكِنَّهُ أَصْبَحَ مُمْتِعًا بَعْدَ ذَلِكَ.
sentences.translation: U početku je bilo teško, ali je nakon toga postalo zabavno.
sentences.translationEn: It was difficult at first, but it became enjoyable after that.
